top_posts.text: Loaded up on more $TSLA this morning. The thesis keeps getting stronger.
top_posts.author: MacroMarx

top_posts.text: How does Tesla compare to its competitors at current multiples? $TSLA Also watching $NIO.
top_posts.author: ChartWitch

top_posts.text: Sold all my $TSLA today. The momentum is gone and guidance was weak.
top_posts.author: GammaGoblin

top_posts.text: Tesla guidance was a beat across the board. $TSLA to new highs. Also watching $NIO.
top_posts.author: QuantJanitor

top_posts.text: $TSLA breaking down below support on rising volume. Not good.
top_posts.author: TendieTracker

correlation.readout: Chatter tends to FOLLOW price moves by ~1h (strong, r=0.75) — the crowd is reacting to TSLA's tape, not predicting it.
